mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT * FROM user WHERE name = #{name} and isDelete = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (name, sex, phone, email, password, create_time, isDelete) VALUES (#{name}, #{sex}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{password}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET isDelete = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET isDelete = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (id, name, sex, phone, email, password, create_time, isDelete) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{sex}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{password}, NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), sex = VALUES(sex), phone = VALUES(phone), email = VALUES(email), password = VALUES(password)
